subcategory: 3D circular image gallery with WebGL rendering
use_cases: Showcasing portfolio work in an immersive 3D carousel
Displaying product images in a curved gallery format
Creating interactive hero sections with scroll-driven image reveals
Building creative portfolio and agency websites
Implementing feature highlights with animated 3D visuals
ai_summary: A 3D circular image gallery component built with OGL (WebGL) that displays images in a curved, scrollable carousel. Features configurable curvature, border radius, and smooth scroll-based animations with easing. Uses canvas-generated text textures and 3D mesh transformations for an immersive visual experience suitable for creative portfolios and product showcases.
